items.title: I built my first three apps using Cursor and thought that was fast, but trying Replit for…
items.title_zh: 我使用 Cursor 构建了前三个应用程序，认为速度很快，但尝试 Replit...
items.description: “I built my first three apps using Cursor and thought that was fast, but trying Replit for Dial completely blew me away. I built the MVP over a single weekend, and it actually got approved by Apple on the very first try—which has never hap…
items.description_zh: “我使用 Cursor 构建了前三个应用程序，并认为速度很快，但尝试 Replit for Dial 完全让我大吃一惊。我在一个周末内构建了 MVP，而且它实际上在第一次尝试时就获得了 Apple 的批准 - 这从未发生过……

items.title_zh: 已处理 1400 条回复 ◾ OpenAI 正在追赶 Anthropic ◾ “Codex” 被更多提及……
items.description: Processed 1400 replies ◾ OpenAI is catching up to Anthropic ◾ 'Codex' got more mentions than 'Claude Code' ◾ However, by model mentions, A\ is mogging https://t.co/BjtqVGmlUg https://t.co/74j8QbxuLX

items.title: Show me the thing you’ve built with AI you’re most proud of.
items.title_zh: 告诉我你用人工智能构建的最令你自豪的东西。
items.description: Show me the thing you’ve built with AI you’re most proud of. Reply with a working product URL and what model / agent you primarily used.
items.description_zh: 告诉我你用人工智能构建的最令你自豪的东西。回复可用产品 URL 以及您主要使用的型号/代理。

items.title: This is a fantastic post about why jobs aren’t going away in the way some predict.
items.title_zh: 这是一篇精彩的文章，讲述了为什么工作岗位不会像某些人预测的那样消失。
items.description: This is a fantastic post about why jobs aren’t going away in the way some predict. We are constantly making the mistake of confusing task completion with AI with being able to eliminate the whole job. Even as we can automate one or many ta…
items.description_zh: 这是一篇精彩的文章，讲述了为什么工作岗位不会像某些人预测的那样消失。我们经常犯这样的错误：将人工智能的任务完成与能够消除整个工作混为一谈。即使我们可以自动化一个或多个任务……

meta.bio: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI

items.title: My newest gbrain-evals just dropped
items.title_zh: 我最新的 gbrain-evals 刚刚掉落
items.description: My newest gbrain-evals just dropped - this is how gbrain does vs other options. https://t.co/yRWm72QEgf is SOTA for reranking and embedding cost, speed, and retrieval success. GBrain beats MemPalace by 1% on LongMemEval and beats Vector RA…
items.description_zh: 我最新的 gbrain-evals 刚刚下降 - 这就是 gbrain 与其他选项的对比。 https://t.co/yRWm72QEgf 是重新排序和嵌入成本、速度和检索成功率的 SOTA。 GBrain 在 LongMemEval 上击败 MemPalace 1%，并击败 Vector RA……

items.title: Thinking Machines is impressive.
items.title_zh: 思维机器令人印象深刻。
items.description: Thinking Machines is impressive. In a couple hours I just fine tuned my own Qwen3.5-397B model this afternoon. Fast usable multimodal is also going to enable very mind-blowing personal AI. https://t.co/mm3laZb766
items.description_zh: 思维机器令人印象深刻。今天下午，几个小时后我刚刚微调了我自己的 Qwen3.5-397B 模型。快速可用的多模式也将实现令人兴奋的个人人工智能。 https://t.co/mm3laZb766

items.title: We should fight the people who want to stop startups from staying in San Francisco.
items.title_zh: 我们应该与那些想要阻止初创公司留在旧金山的人作斗争。
items.description: We should fight the people who want to stop startups from staying in San Francisco. We want more startups and more prosperity. I'm fighting back through Garry's List Action, I'm in for $50K, I need 9 more people to match me. Are you in? ht…
items.description_zh: 我们应该与那些想要阻止初创公司留在旧金山的人作斗争。我们希望有更多的初创企业和更多的繁荣。我正在通过 Garry's List Action 进行反击，我的奖金为 5 万美元，我还需要 9 个人来匹配我。你在吗？呃……

items.description: Wrote this almost a year ago, and finally starting to see more B2B companies wake up to this opportunity.. Don’t wait another year. Narratives and vibes are extremely important to stand out amongst the slop 🪄 https://t.co/Hcu1kTqo9H

items.title: I always wanted a GitHub dashboard: See my repos, open Issues/PRs, what version I release…
items.title_zh: 我一直想要一个 GitHub 仪表板：查看我的存储库、打开的问题/PR、我发布的版本……
items.description: I always wanted a GitHub dashboard: See my repos, open Issues/PRs, what version I released last, how many commits since last release. So I built one for everyone. https://t.co/GWCP5wcrDQ https://t.co/DRvjenlVMi
items.description_zh: 我一直想要一个 GitHub 仪表板：查看我的存储库、打开的问题/PR、我上次发布的版本、自上次发布以来的提交次数。所以我为每个人建立了一个。 https://t.co/GWCP5wcrDQ https://t.co/DRvjenlVMi
